/usr/bin/ar qc libre2.a CMakeFiles/re2.dir/bitstate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/compile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/dfa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/filtered_re2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/mimics_pcre.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/nfa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/onepass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/perl_groups.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/prefilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/prefilter_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/prog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/re2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/regexp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/set.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/simplify.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/stringpiece.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/tostring.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/unicode_casefold.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/unicode_groups.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/rune.cpp.o CMakeFiles/re2.dir/strutil.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libre2.a
